word: G3646 - ὁλοκαύτωμα - holokaútōma - hol-ok-ow'-to-mah - Burnt offering

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὁλοκαύτωμα

- Transliteration: Holokautoma

- Phonetic: hol-ok-ow'-to-mah

- Definition:

1. a whole burnt offering

a. a victim the whole (and not like other victims only a part) of which was burned

- Origin: from a derivative of a compound of G3650 and a derivative of G2545

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From a derivative of a compound of G3650 and a derivative of G2545; a wholly consumed sacrifice (holocaust): - (whole) burnt offering.
